headings.usage: Use for all dashboard titles, metric values, and command bar prompts.

body.usage: Use for dense data, table rows, lists, and form inputs.

rules: Use 95% monochrome. Color exists only to guide action.
Tinted Grey Rule: Neutral greys must have a tiny bit of blue (cool) or orange (warm).
Never use pure transparent backgrounds for overlays or headers.

surfaces: Flat Solid: Default for dashboard cards. 1px subtle border, no shadow.
Neumorphism (Clay & Crisp): For widgets/toggles. Mix soft shadow with 1px border.
Glassmorphism (Crystal/Apple): For AI Command Bar and sticky headers. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark), with 1px delicate inner stroke.
Tracing Beam: For the AI Command Bar focus state. A moving gradient line tracing the border with blur-md behind it.
visual_enhancers.corners: rounded-sm (2px to 4px) to emphasize the sharp Swiss/Brutalist feel.

navigation.mobile: Bottom navigation bar with 4-5 key tabs. Floating glassmorphism island.
navigation.desktop: Sharp, collapsible left sidebar with 1px right border.

ai_command_bar.description: Signature feature. Central floating pill or prominent top bar. Uses glassmorphism and tracing beam on focus. Free-form text input with inline suggestion chips.

cards_and_widgets.description: Cardless or dense rectangular styles. Do not overuse standard Shadcn cards. Use raw divs with border-r and border-b in a grid to create technical grids.

kanban_board.description: Desktop: Traditional vertical columns. Mobile: Card rows or swipeable columns. Minimalist cards showing 2-3 key metrics.

data_tables.description: Mobile: Expandable list items. Desktop: Dense data tables with hover lifts (-translate-y-px) and subtle shadow.

grids.dashboard_mode: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-4 or gap-6.
bento_rules: Primary data (Charts/Kanban): col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3.
Use align-self: stretch for items to fill layout.

layouts.spacing: Generous container spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards to prevent text collision. For footers/end sections, use py-20.
layouts.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense data, labels, and forms. Center-align only for global empty states or AI prompts.

rules: Hover states for all interactive elements (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease).
Micro-animations on tab switches and command bar activation.
Entrance staggered animations for list items and kanban cards.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text. 3:1 for large text/interactive elements. Use APCA contrast calculator.
accessibility.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='ai-command-input').

3d_libraries_and_steps.usage: Use lightweight TSParticles for floating constellation nodes behind the login screen or within the AI Command Bar idle state to subtly communicate 'AI network' without heavy WebGL overhead.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI with a bottom navigation bar for small screens and a side/top nav for desktop.
Implement the 'AI Command Bar' as a signature feature using glassmorphism and a prominent floating layout.
Ensure global language switcher (EN/HU) is easily accessible.
Role-based access should be visually distinct (e.g., admin settings only visible if role=admin).
Customize Shadcn components using the defined colors and rounded-sm border radii. Do not use generic Shadcn styles.
Use .js/jsx files, not .tsx as per project config.
Include data-testid on every interactive element.
general_ui_ux_design_guidelines: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Prioritize optical alignment over geometric alignment.
Layer elements to create depth with z-index hierarchies.
Use progressive disclosure on mobile to prevent info overload.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Use the provided typography (Cabinet Grotesk + IBM Plex Sans) to stand out.
Do not apply 'transition: all'. Explicitly list transitioned properties.
Do not center-align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is forbidden).
Never use AI assistant emoji characters for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Missing categories = do NOT use placeholder text. Use provided image URLs.
